visual_description: A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot shows a young man with dark hair and round glasses in a dimly lit, dark environment. He is wearing a dark, collared jacket. The background is almost entirely black, with only faint, out-of-focus shapes suggesting a cluttered or industrial space. The lighting is low-key, casting deep shadows and highlighting the side of his face. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man's profile. The audio is filled with a low, ambient, and suspenseful musical score. A deep, resonant drone creates a sense of unease and anticipation, while high-pitched, ethereal notes float above, adding a layer of mystery and tension to the atmosphere. The man slowly turns his head to look over his shoulder directly at the camera. His expression is one of concern and apprehension, with wide eyes and a slightly open mouth. In the top right corner of the screen, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. There is no dialogue or narration in the audio. The camera holds this close-up shot, capturing his worried reaction.
